title: agathosma vestita
intro: Agathosma vestita, also known as the bushveld buchu or mountain buchu, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agathosma vestita include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Agathosma vestita typically include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
